decisions.rationale: Self-contained question asking how long an OTP sent from the EC postal voting portal will take to be received; directly matches OTP delivery time intent.
Clearly asks whether the OTP message in Postal Vote BD takes some time to arrive, which is about OTP delivery timing.
Asks if the Postal Vote BD OTP arrives instantly or with delay; this cleanly fits the delivery-time/delay intent.
Directly asks how many minutes the postal vote app OTP takes to arrive; central fit for the tag.
Asks the OTP receive time for the EC postal vote app; self-contained and clearly about OTP delivery time.
Asks how quickly the OTP for the EC postal vote portal arrives; matches the intended delivery-time question.
Asks the approximate time limit to receive a verification code for EC postal vote service; verification/confirmation code timing is within the tag.
Asks the approximate number of minutes to get an OTP for the EC postal vote service; clearly fits OTP delivery time despite slightly compact phrasing.

result.packet_rationale: All rows are self-contained and ask about how long an OTP, verification, or confirmation code takes to arrive or be received in the postal vote BD/EC app, portal, or service. No row is about password reset or another avoided intent, and none is too generic or context-dependent.
